market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Modern 2‑Apt Suite – Free Parking, Prime Spot
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to Marta’s beautifully appointed two‑apartment home, perfect for up to four guests seeking a premium stay in the heart of the city. Each apartment offers a spacious layout, modern décor, and a fully equipped kitchen, ensuring you have everything you need for a comfortable visit. Guests consistently praise the property, reflected in an outstanding 4.94 rating from 252 reviews. A standout feature is the complimentary van‑size parking space right on the premises – a rare convenience in this market. While the nightly rate stands at £439, the home delivers a high‑end experience that justifies the price. Over the next 90 days, 21.7% of the nights are already booked, leaving 70 open nights ready for new guests. Although Marta is not yet a Superhost, the glowing reviews demonstrate a strong commitment to hospitality. Whether you’re traveling for business or leisure, this entire‑home offering blends luxury, convenience, and a prime location, making it an ideal base for exploring the city’s attractions. Book now to enjoy the spacious apartments, free parking, and the peace of mind that comes with a top‑rated stay.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a front‑facing exterior shot that clearly shows the free van parking space as the cover photo, because parking is the unique selling point and instantly grabs a traveller’s attention.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly price of £439 is 151% higher than the city median (£175) while your 90‑day occupancy is only 21.7% (70 open nights), so lowering the rate or adding promotions could capture more bookings.
The current title 'Two apartments with free van parking' omits high‑search keywords and the luxury aspect; replace it with an SEO‑rich title under 50 characters to improve click‑through rates.
No amenities are listed despite a 4.94 rating; adding essential amenities like free Wi‑Fi, a TV and an outdoor seating area will align with guest expectations and boost desirability.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your nightly rate of £439 is 151% above the market median, yet only 21.7% of your next 90 days are booked, leaving 70 nights unfilled.
